Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Supports creativity and innovation in the 'cultural industry' (Target 8.3). Protecting intellectual property enables decent work and economic growth for creators like musicians and artists.
evidence: Cultural Industry and Intellectual Property
內容產業的合作 (cooperation of the content industry)
協助樂團或單獨創作者申請團名或藝名商標 (assist bands or individual creators in applying for trademarks for their band or stage names)

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Core focus on 'Innovation and Intellectual Property Management' within the 'cultural industry', directly supporting technological upgrading and innovation (Target 9.5) through projects like 'AI-assisted music creation'.
evidence: Graduate Institute of Technology, Innovation and Intellectual Property Management
AI輔助音樂創作相關專利之分析 (Analysis of patents related to AI-assisted music creation)
cultural industry

evidence: 維護智慧財產權 (Respect Copyright)
著作權法 (Copyright Law)

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Connects to safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4) by protecting the intellectual property of the 'cultural industry', including projects with the 'Taiwan Animation and Comic Promotion Association'.

evidence: 理解與辨別社會責任與永續議題 (Students will understand and be able to identify social responsibility and sustainability issues)

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Directly promotes the rule of law (Target 16.3) by focusing on 'Copyright Law', tracking 'court judgments', and analyzing 'legislative developments' to build strong institutional practices.
evidence: 著作權法 (Copyright Law)

國內外立法動態 (domestic and foreign legislative developments)

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course is structured 'through and with the cooperation of the content industry', exemplifying multi-stakeholder partnerships (Target 17.16, 17.17) with associations and unions.
evidence: 透過和內容產業的合作 (through and with the cooperation of the content industry)

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Model A's reasoning is explicitly supported by the text, detailing 'cooperation of the content industry' and specific partner organizations (Target 17.16, 17.17).
